details.IncidentDetail: "[95] A87-011 VEH AT CORTES YARD "
"[94] 11 FOLLOWING 1185 TO THE CORTES YARD "
"[93] ^1039 CT-HQ (MIKE), CPZ UPDATES"
"[92] ^CT718 HAS REPOSITIONED PCSM TO NB 805 JSO BALBOA, LHS"
"[91] ^CT713 ADV CLSR IS NOW IN PLACE AT NB 805 AND 52, ALL TRFC BEING DIVERTED TO SR-52 , EB/WB SR-52 RAMPS TO NB 805 ARE OPEN AND GOVERNOR ONR TO NB 805 REMAINS CLOSED"
"[90] ^CT713 ADV: WILL BE RECONFIGURING CLSR, WILL BE CLOSING NB 805 AT 52 AND DIVERTING ALL TRFC TO SR-52"
"[89] [Rotation Request Comment] ***1039 CORTES TOW 619-300-7946 W/ 2 EVIDENCE"
"[88] 87-S8 EVIDENCE 1185 FOR 2 VEHS"
"[86] ^CT713-6 ADV CT HAS TAKEN OVER CLSR ON GOVERNOR ONR"
"[84] A87-011 ALL VEHS OO CLOSURE NOW"
"[83] ^CT718 ADV 1097 W/ CMS TRK: N805 AT CLAIREMONNT MESA, RHS, MSG READS: "NB 805 CLOSED AHEAD/ USE 52 WEST TO NB 5""
"[79] 87-23 CT CLOSURE IN PLACE EVERYONE DIV TO GOVERNOR"
"[78] ^CT713-6 ADV 1097 W/ HARD CLSR, #1-5 LNS CLOSED, TRFC BEING DIVERTED TO GOVERNOR OFR"
"[77] A87-011 CT SETTING UP CLOSURE NOW"
"[76] A87-011 PUSHING VEHS OFF AT GOV NOW"
"[75] ^CT713 (MIRT TK) ADV ENRT"
"[71] 11 NO CONE OR FLARE PATTERN IN PLACE "
"[69] 11 HAVE A WATCH UNITS BRING IN BRK TO NB 805 TO GOV OFR TO SET UP CLSR, WE WILL HAVE VEHS GO WW ON THE ONR "

"[67] ^1039 CT780 / WILL WORK ON A CALL OUT TO GET A CMS TK ENRT"
"[63] ^CT713 IS ALSO REQ PCMS TK"
